resources:
mn Монгол хэл JugglucoNG OK Цуцлах "Garmin Connect SDK эхлүүлэхэд алдаа гарлаа: " Скан хийх боломжгүй. Энэ төхөөрөмж NFC дэмждэггүй. NFC унтраалттай байна. Төхөөрөмжийн тохиргооноос асаана уу. Kerfstok цаг дээр суулгагдаагүй байна Kerfstok цаг дээр суулгагдаагүй байна. Garmin Connect IQ дэлгүүрээс суулгаж болно. Глюкоз хэт бага эсвэл хэт өндөр байна Juggluco мэдрэгчтэй холболтоо алдсан байна Тун хийх, хооллох эсвэл дасгал хийх сануулга Одоогийн глюкозын утгыг мэдэгдэнэ Ажиллаж байгаа програм Зөвшөөрөл Скан хийх Сканууд Түүх Дамжуулалт Дахин тохируулах Тусламж Өмнөх үе рүү хайх Bluetooth байхгүй Bluetooth асаалттай Bluetooth унтраалттай Хэмжээ @string/amountsname Хоол Хаах Дэлгэц дээр харагдаж буй сүүлийн утга хүртэл хадгална. Эхлэх хугацаа нь заасан хоногийн тоогоор өмнөх үеэс эхэлнэ. Илрүүлэх IP шалгах Шошго шалгах Зөвхөн идэвхгүй Зөвхөн идэвхтэй Хоёулаа Хүлээн авах эх үүсвэр "Хүлээн авагч дээрх өгөгдөл дараах хүртэл байна: " Харагдах Нууц үг Устгах Өөр төхөөрөмж рүү илгээх өгөгдлийг заана уу IP хаяг заах шаардлагатай Сүлжээний порт 1024–65535 хооронд байх ёстой Эхлэх Одоо Mirror хэмжээний мэдээллийг илгээнэ Энэ төхөөрөмж: Doze горим уу? Синк хийх Дохио Хадгалах Холболт нэмэх Дэлгэц хүрэхийг унтраах Глюкозын мэдэгдэл Глюкоз бага үеийн дохио "Шошго: " "Бүхэлдэх: " "Жин: " Дуудлагын ая Глюкоз өндөр үеийн дохио Утга бэлэн болсон мэдэгдэл Дохио тасарсны дараах анхааруулга "Can't set minutes to " минут хэт урт байна "Зорилтот хүрээ: " "Графикийн хүрээ: " "Нэгж" Глюкозын тэнхлэг ЗҮҮН Скан хийхэд апп нээгдэнэ xDrip-тэй нийцтэй Камерын товчийг идэвхгүй болгох Дэлгэцийг урвуулах NFC дуу Гараар масштаблах Цаг Глюкоз Bluetooth-ээр мэдрэгчтэй холбогдох Mirror биш төхөөрөмж дээр дохио ажиллуулахын тулд Sensor via bluetooth-ийг асаасан байх ёстой Эхлээд нэгж тохируулна уу Тоон шошго Өнгө Сануулга Дэлгэц Товчлол Нарийвчилсан Шинэ Сүүлийнхийг устгах Хоол: Дуугарах Хоног буруу. Хоног нь эерэг бүхэл тоо байх ёстой. Хураангуй график Мартах Дахин идэвхжүүлэх Мэдээлэл Сүүлийн алдаа Сүүлийн амжилт Үе шат Bluetooth ашиглах Холболт Гар барилт Глюкозын утга Мэдээлэл Төхөөрөмжид зориулсан тохиргоо хийх Doze горимд шинэчлэх Шинэчлэх Илгээх дараалал Дахин эхлүүлэх Цагны апп цаг дээр суусан байна Алдаа Зүйл нэмэх "Бүхэлдэх " Давтах Орц: Сонгох Нүүрс ус: Нүүрс ус Нийт: Хоолны нийт: Тоо хэмжээ " тутамд " Орцыг заах шаардлагатай Хэмжээг заах шаардлагатай Тодорхойлох Засах Нэр: Нэгж дэх нүүрс ус: Өгөгдлийн сан Хайх Мөрдөх Тодорхойгүй Тэгийг харуулах 100 граммын найрлага Төлөв Тохиргоо Цагны апп эхлүүлэх Цаг олдсонгүй Kerfstok цагны апп авах Хоол Устгах уу? Дуу Тоглуулах Үндсэн Гэрэл анивчих Зөвшөөрөл Товчлол Утга Дараагийн хуудас IP-үүд: Порт "хадгалагдлаа" Хадгалах амжилтгүй Хадгалагдаагүй Exception алдаанаас болж амжилтгүй боллоо Өгөгдөл байхгүй Мэдрэгчийн дуусах огноог календарьт нэмэх "Мэдрэгчийн дуусах огноо " Нээх Мэдрэгчгүй Library зөв ажиллахгүй байна. Өөрийг туршина уу. Суулгасан library %s задлах боломжгүй. Өөр APK туршина уу. Холбогдож байна Өгөгдөл солилцохоор ажиллана "Үүнээс хойш шинэ утга алга: " %1$s хугацаанд шинэ утга алга %1$s цагаас хойш шинэ утга алга " Глюкоз бага!" " Глюкоз өндөр!" @string/lowglucose @string/highglucose Илгээх газар Өгөгдлийг дахин илгээх Хамгийн бага Идэвхгүй минут: Үргэлжлэх хугацаа (сек): Үргэлжлэх хугацаа: сек " оруулаагүй" " болон " Саад болох Libreview рүү илгээх Libreview Одоо илгээх "Sensor via Bluetooth" асаалттай байх эсвэл үүнийг mirror болгон тохируулсан байх шаардлагатай Чичиргээ Турбо Харанхуй горим Үржүүлэх: Хурдан үйлчилдэг инсулин Урт үйлчилдэг инсулин Тайлбар Илгээхгүй Хэмжээг илгээх Өгөгдлийг дахин илгээх үү? Libreview рүү давхардсан өгөгдөл илгээхээс болгоомжилно уу. Account ID-г Libreview-ээс авах уу? The Account ID is needed to use Libre3 sensors that are activated with Abbotts Libre3 app with this Libreview account. Холболтыг устгах уу? Wakelock Wi-Fi Зүрхний цохилт Libre (засварласан апп) Glucodata GlucoDataHandler (GDH) xDrip broadcast AAPS compatible Мэдрэгчийн зөвшөөрөл needed to display heart rate. Set it in Device Settings, Apps, Permissions, Juggluco Хөвөгч глюкоз @string/floatglucose Үсгийн хэмжээ @string/fontsize Үсгийн хэмжээ хэт том байна. Дээд хэмжээ= Урд өнгө Арын өнгө Арын- Тунгалаг Хүрч болох Зөвшөөрөл шаардлагатай adb shell pm grant tk.glucodata android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW https://www.juggluco.nl/Jugglucohelp/floatingconfig.html Сануулгыг устгах уу? Шошгыг устгах уу? Салгах Энэ мэдрэгчийг дамжуулалтад ашиглахаа зогсоох уу? И-мэйл: Account ID авах И-мэйл хаяг хэт богино байна И-мэйл хаяг хэт урт байна Нууц үг хамгийн багадаа 8 тэмдэгт байх ёстой Нууц үгийн дээд урт 36 тэмдэгт Libreview-ээс Гараар "Account ID заагаагүй байна " "Формат буруу " "Дараахыг сонсож буй апп алга: " api_secret Хадгалалгүй гарах уу? Идэвхтэй SSL ашиглах Full Chain Private Key Зөвхөн локал : api_secret too long. max= " invalid port number" "new api_secret: " "new port =" Веб сервер Хэмжээ оруулах Android Алдаа гарлаа " тун " " тун " Инсулины үзгийг уншиж чадсангүй. Дахин оролдоно уу. "Инсулины төрлийг дараах болгож өөрчлөх: " "Төрөл: " Зөвхөн дараах хугацаанаас хойших тунг нэмэх: Өөрчлөх Синк хийгдээгүй Үндсэн тохиргоо руу буцаахад өгөгдөл алдагдаж болзошгүй. Үндсэн тохиргоо Мэдэгдэх Тусдаа Шууд Дохио нь сэрүүлэг шиг ажиллана Хурд Өнгө аяс Дуу хоолой Хоорондын секунд Турших Bluetooth түүх Spy views Утга байхгүй Ярих Цаг Цэсүүд Системийн UI Мэдрэгчүүд Тохиргоо Тухай Экспортлох Mirror Шинэ хэмжээ Жагсаалт Статистик Хөвөгч Сүүлийн скан Огноо Нэг хоног өмнө Нэг хоног дараа Нэг долоо хоног өмнө Нэг долоо хоног дараа Хүрэхэд ярих Мессежийг унших Дохиог унших Глюкозыг унших Олдсонгүй No Ringtone Picker found "Can't play " " seconds" "Duration can't be negative: " " too large, maximum=65535, " " too large" Can\'t use specification Turn on NEARBY DEVICES permission Enable Bluetooth Turn on Location permission Bluetooth is turned off When everything is sent to a host, \"Receive from\" should be turned off. The port number should be different from the mirror port The port number should be different from the http port " ready in " Sensor ready for use " ends at this time" Tried nothing Success All data will be sent again which takes time and can have consequences for Libreview and Kerfstok Error parsing IP Maximal number of hosts exceeded Juggluco sends to maximal 6 hosts hostname Now clamp "Send from: " Change start Above Uploader Upload Sibionics mmol/L mg/dL Interval Off Off " Streaming enabled" " Streaming not enabled" EverSense Broadcast Threshold Make floating glucose untouchable? 12h Complications Watchface color Глюкозын утга Glucose arrow Value + arrow Glucose Value small Glucose Arrow small Value + arrow small Text Arrow WARNING: “Receive from” not set, but some data types are not sent. First specify for each label what should be done with it. Photo Scan the data matrix of a Dexcom G7/ONE+ or Sibionics GS1 sensor or the mirror QR code. Predict (Dexcom) Initializing Juggluco running on phone?\n\nWIFI and Bluetooth enabled? Connected! Close button \u23F0 File size Logging Insulin Aspart/NovoRapid/NovoLog Fiasp Insulin Lispro/Humalog URLi/Lyumjev/insulin lispro-aabc Insulin Glulisine/Apidra Human Insulin/Humulin R/Novolin R Afrezza Not Sibionics EU Sibionics Chinese Hematonix Sibionics 2 Split "Data present: " Overwrite? Auto QR
Send data from this phone to another phone on your home network. Pressing OK will generate a connection on this phone and display a QR code that can be scanned by another Android device. Scanning the QR code with left menu→Photo on the other phone will generate a connection, by which it will receive all data from this phone. Google scan WARNING: weight (%.1f) not 0 " Very LOW glucose!" " Very HIGH glucose!" " Very LOW!" " Very HIGH!" " Soon LOW glucose!" " Soon HIGH glucose!" Very low glucose alarm Very high glucose alarm Alarm when soon below Alarm when soon above Schedules "Profile " Loss of signal Value notification
Scan TRANSMITTER data matrix Sibionics 2 sensor data matrix succesfully scanned. \nScan now the transmitter data matrix." Successfully added connection to left middle menu→Mirror. Дахин тохируулах Clears transmitter memory. Should be pressed before using a new sensor in an already used transmitter. Use the EverSense Broadcast instead. See help. Calibration Exclude Apply to past Blood glucose: Visual mode Calibrated Delete calibration? Hide
Nothing yet Calibrations All values Write down! Switch "Last: " "Only add glucose readings from after: " "First select the label for blood glucose" "Glucose Meters" "Find devices" "No new data" "New data" Connected Disconnected phone watch Direct sensor- Enter amounts on connection Bug Internet Home net ICE Username ICE Label 0 1 Mirror via QR TURN Servers TURN Server
Notification Chart Display glucose graph in notification bar Use Google Play Services for QR scanning Share/Receive data via Internet/Home Net Upload to Nightscout Glucose Alerts and Alarms Glucose range Target Chart Target range Chart range Select Unit Select Theme Select Language System Default Scanner
Debug Logs Clear Trace.log Logcat Log enabled. Waiting for entries... Log unchecked. Enable to start. "Error reading file: " "Error saving file: "
Mirror Settings Auto QR Home Network Home Net Sender Internet Sender Home Net Receiver Internet Receiver Хаах Холболт Label Deactivated Enable Disable ICE ICE Label Hostname / IP IP шалгах Шошго шалгах Master Passive Only Active Only Data present until: Show password Hide password Turn Server Холболт нэмэх Тусламж Илгээх газар Хүлээн авах эх үүсвэр QR Хэмжээ Сканууд Дамжуулалт Exchange data
Dashboard Stats
No data available days Төлөв No sensors found Add Sensor Мэдрэгчүүд Add Sensor
Calibration Algorithm Restart auto-calibration? Clear all in-app auto-calibration data, restart algorithm and reconnect? Restart Auto Raw Auto+Raw Raw+Auto Broadcast Restart auto-calibration
The trend is rising by %1$s percent. The trend is falling by %1$s percent. The trend remains unchanged.
%1$s in use %1$s remaining Expired %1$dd %1$dh
Theme System Default Light Dark Нарийвчилсан Debug Logs Nightscout Config
LibreView Sync with Abbott LibreView LibreView Settings Email Нууц үг Send to LibreView Enable LibreView upload Show Current Glucose Mark as Viewed Send Insulin/Carbs Send Now Resend Data Account ID Account ID авах Төлөв Russia region Low High
Disconnect Sensor? This will permanently stop the sensor session. This will disconnect the sensor. Pairing keys and history are preserved — you can reconnect later. Remove Sensor? This will permanently remove the sensor, wipe pairing keys, and stop the session. The sensor must be re-paired to use again. Remove Wipe sensor data Салгах Keep sensor info Reconnect Sensor? This will reset the connection and attempt to reconnect. Reconnect Forget Sensor? This will remove the sensor from the list. It may reappear if scanned again. Reset sensor? This will reset the Sibionics 2 sensor. Continue? Reset sensor Reset all? Clear all old data, calibrations, and reset the sensor? Reset all This will restart the sensor and reset the auto-calibration algorithm. Keep auto-calibration data Enabled Disabled Last BLE status Address Started Ends Officially Expected End Battery Auto reset %1$d days Хэзээ ч үгүй
No Sensor Connected Connect a continuous glucose monitor to start tracking your glucose levels.
Sibionics Setup Scan Sensor QR Code Scan the data matrix on the sensor packaging Select Sensor Type Scan Transmitter Connecting... Setup Complete
Libre Setup Hold your phone near the sensor to scan Scan Libre Sensor LibreView Account LibreView upload is optional, but Libre 3 sensors require the Account ID to work Scan Sensor Skip Next Done Libre 3 + LibreView Adjust experimental Libre 3 scan behavior before pairing. Libre 3 NFC command Choose which command Juggluco sends during the Libre 3 NFC scan Auto Use the default Libre 3 scan behavior from Juggluco A0 Activate Force the A0 Activate command during the scan A8 Switch Receiver Force the A8 Switch Receiver command during the scan Account ID ready Account ID missing Enter credentials and request the Account ID for Libre 3 sensors Account ID obtained Timed out. Check credentials and try again.
Dexcom Setup Scan the data matrix on your Dexcom sensor Scan Dexcom
Accu-Chek Setup Scan the data matrix on your Accu-Chek SmartGuide sensor Scan Accu-Chek
CareSens Air Setup Scan the sensor code on your CareSens Air package Scan CareSens Air
Delete Sensor This will remove the sensor and all its data. This cannot be undone. Устгах General Settings Alerts and notifications
Data Management Export Data Save history to CSV/TSV Export Settings Save all app settings, credentials, and device keys Import Data Load backup or Libreview file Import Data/Settings Restore history CSV or settings JSON Import settings? This replaces app settings, credentials, device keys, and mirror configuration, then restarts the app. Settings imported. Restarting... Days to export Quick range Add patient information Hide patient information Optional details included in exported reports. Patient name Patient ID Date of birth Care team Danger Zone Clear History Remove all glucose readings. Cannot be undone. Remove all glucose readings from database Clear App Data Remove history and cache, keep settings Factory Reset Remove everything, return to first-run state Remove EVERYTHING. Cannot be undone! Factory Reset? Clear History? Clear App Data? Turbo (high priority) Requests high connection priority AutoConnect Uses passive background connection Data smoothing Smooth chart data and, unless Smooth only graph is enabled, resolved glucose values Disabled 1 minute 2 minutes 3 minutes 5 minutes 7 minutes Smoothing window Smooth only graph Keep current glucose, widgets, alerts and broadcasts unsmoothed Collapse into chunks Keep one smoothed point per interval and filter out points in between Keep one smoothed point every %1$d minutes Keep one smoothed point every 5 minutes while smoothing still uses %1$d minutes Chunks every %1$d min Preview window Show a 24-hour mini navigator under the dashboard chart without changing the main chart behavior Expanded view (default) Always Хэзээ ч үгүй View trace.log and logcat mg/dL mmol/L Alert Mode Sound & Vibrate Чичиргээ
Low High Very Low Very High Forecast Low Forecast High Signal Loss Missed Reading Persistent High Sensor Expiry Alerts when no glucose reading arrives for the configured duration Alerts when the current sensor is nearing expiry Value Available Amount Alert
Import History Import glucose data from a CSV file Get started by adding your sensor Select Sensor Type " or " No sensors connected Enter Sensor Codes Enter the codes printed on the sensor label Batch Code (10) First code on label (8-16 chars), e.g. %1$s Serial Number Second code (10-20 chars), e.g. %1$s Confirm Enter Transmitter Code Enter the transmitter ID from the label Transmitter ID 8-12 characters from transmitter label Scan QR Code Scan the QR code on your generic Sibionics sensor box. Scan QR Code Select from Gallery Skip (Use Fake Sensor) Enter Code Manually Choose your Sibionics sensor variant Continue Sensor initialization failed Error: Sensor lost. Please restart setup. "Invalid device name: " "Failed to connect to " Sensor not initialized. Use \'Scan Sensor\' first. Invalid code format. Please try again. No QR code found in image
Go Filter by date Select Export Format CSV File (.csv) Best for Excel/Analysis Readable Text (.txt) Best for sharing/printing Экспортлох Export History Save glucose readings to CSV or text file Import History Restore glucose readings from CSV file Clear History? This will remove all glucose readings from the database. This action cannot be undone. Delete Reading? Remove this glucose reading from local history. This action cannot be undone. Clear Clear App Data? This will remove: • All glucose readings • Cache files • Sensor data • All settings Settings will be preserved. This action cannot be undone. Clear Data ⚠️ Factory Reset? This will REMOVE EVERYTHING: The app will return to first-run state. THIS CANNOT BE UNDONE! RESET EVERYTHING Alert Sound GPL-3.0 • Fork of Juggluco Refreshing...
Auto-calibration mode Juggluco native window Auto restart algorithm Bluetooth off Connection failed Connected Disconnected Connected, waiting for data... Connected, raw values received Select sensor type Choose theme Sibionics Scan QR code Libre 2/3 Via NFC Dexcom G6/G7/One Accu-Chek SmartGuide Scan Data Matrix + Bluetooth CareSens Air Scan code + Bluetooth AiDex / LinX Configure AiDex or LinX CGM via Bluetooth iCan i3 / Sinocare Configure iCan i3/i6/i7 CGM via Bluetooth MQ / Glutec Pair a Glutec / MQ CGM transmitter via Bluetooth Anytime / Yuwell 4 / 4H Pair an Anytime / Yuwell CT3 CGM transmitter via Bluetooth
Anytime / Yuwell Setup Searching for Anytime / Yuwell transmitters… Keep the transmitter close and make sure it is powered on. %1$s · Anytime CT3 family %1$s · shown because \"See all devices\" is on Pairing %1$s…
MQ / Glutec Setup Searching for MQ / Glutec transmitters… Keep the transmitter close and make sure it is powered on. %1$s · Nordic UART detected %1$s · shown because \"See all devices\" is on Pairing %1$s…
Scan Transmitter Select a nearby device or scan the QR code. Clear previous state Scanning for devices... Search Bluetooth Found Devices: Looking for nearby transmitters... Or scan QR code Scan Transmitter Connecting to sensor... Please wait while we establish a connection.
AiDex / LinX Setup Searching for sensors... AiDex: couldn\'t parse sensor serial from "%1$s" Connecting to %1$s... Connected! Finish Show sensors only See all devices %1$s • not recognized as AiDex %1$s • selectable AiDex-family device %1$s • selectable via FF30 detection
Статистик Your glucose analytics Time in Range Average A1C (GMI) In Range Low High Very Low Very High Variability Score CV: %1$d%% Standard Deviation: %1$s %2$s Glucose Management Indicator Estimated A1C based on your glucose data Coefficient of variation: standard deviation divided by average glucose. Lower values indicate steadier glucose. Std dev Standard deviation: typical distance of readings from your average glucose. Target <7.0% Hourly Patterns Daily Trends Insights Detailed Statistics Readings Median Min Max Range Start tracking your glucose to see statistics Loading...
Excellent Very Good Good Moderate High
Excellent Control! You\'re spending %1$d%% in range - above the 70%% target! Good Progress %1$d%% time in range. Aim for 70%%+ for optimal control. Room for Improvement Currently at %1$d%% TIR. Consider discussing with your healthcare team. Stable Glucose Your variability (CV: %1$d%%) is within target range (<36%%). Great job! High Variability CV of %1$d%% suggests significant glucose swings. Great A1C Estimate Estimated A1C (GMI): %1$.1f%% - within target range! A1C Estimate GMI: %1$.1f%%. Slightly above the 7%% target.
Glucose Variability Index Measures glucose stability and variability patterns Personal Glycemic State Personal Glycemic State: your typical glucose baseline in this range, with confidence and trend context. Interquartile range: the spread of the middle 50% of glucose readings (P25-P75). Lower values mean a tighter, steadier glucose range. Excellent Stability Good Stability Moderate Variability High Variability Stable Baseline Elevated Baseline Low Baseline Unstable Pattern
1D 3D 7D 14D 30D 90D ALL
12 AM 6 AM 12 PM 6 PM
View Details %1$d%% %1$s %2$s
Low High Min Max GVI PSG Stability Confidence Variability GMI Hourly Pattern Avg TIR Total Readings CV
Lowest Highest Typical Daily Pattern Detailed Statistics
Active Time Range Add High Alert Add Low Alert Alerts active from %1$s to %2$s Alerts active from %1$s to %2$s (next day) Alert after Alert name Alert Style App Default Sound Custom High Custom Low Custom Sound Selected Default snooze Delete custom alert Duration End High Alert High Alerts High Alerts Look ahead Low Alert Low Alerts Low Alerts Max retries %1$d min Only alert during selected hours Other Alerts Predictive Alerts Preemptive Snooze Snooze alerts before they trigger Re-alert if not dismissed Constantly Retry every Retry forever Retry if no reaction Every %1$d min • %2$d retries Constantly • %1$d retries Constantly • forever Every %1$d min • forever Select time for %1$s Snooze System Default Sound Tap to change Threshold %1$s - %2$s Volume/Vibration Profile
Font source App (IBM Plex) System Sans System Size: %1$d sp Font weight Regular Medium Device List Glucose Meter Glucose Meter List IOB IOB Help Night Post Nightscout Help Тухай Active positions (randomized) Active time range Add custom sound Addconnection Adjust sensor readings Advanced Alarms Help Scanning for AiDex devices... Alarm Help e.g. Dawn Phenomenon All calibrations cleared Anchor API secret Appearance Apply to all alerts Background opacity: %1$d%% Battery Bias correction Compensates for low readings during the first 48h after reset No pairing or GATT connection required Broadcast-only mode Calibrate Connect sensor first to calibrate. Enter a blood glucose value in %1$s to calibrate the sensor Calibrate Sensor Calibration deleted Calibration profile exported Calibration (%1$s) Calibration Help Calibrations: %1$d Deleted %1$d calibrations %1$d calibrations will be removed Calibrationslist Camera Permission Changestart Choose what to clear Clear calibrations Clear disabled only Color Help Conditions optimal Connection %1$d Connectionoverview Corner radius: %1$d dp Correcting Custom sound: %1$s - Data mode %1$d days %2$d hours Delete %1$d calibrations Deselect all Cleared %1$d disabled calibrations Disabled calibrations: %1$d Disabled: %1$d Display secondary values Show secondary values alongside main reading Display Help Disturb Help %1$d dp Dock to camera cutout Dynamic Island mode Edit alert Edit Calibration Edit connection Enable Bluetooth first Enable calibration Enable overlay Show floating glucose overlay on top of other apps End: %1$s Exchange Help Experimental Export Complete CSV Export failed Export failed: %1$s Export profile Export Readable Report Report visual style Current Minimal Swiss Medical Journal Premium Dark Ink Elegant Typography Export successful Filled Firmware Flash Permission Floating window permission required Floating Config Gap width: %1$s Garmin Config Getaccountid Help Getlib Идэвхтэй All alerts disabled Glucose (%1$s) Hardware reset Clears internal storage, restarts session counter, and enables bias correction Health Permission Helpexport %1$d hours remaining Import failed: %1$s Import profile (merge) Import profile (replace) Imported: %1$d, skipped: %2$d, replaced: %3$d Imported %1$d readings Intensity Intercept Intro Help Invalid profile Kerfstok Label Help Librenum Help LibreView Location Permission Log Help Master alert control Navigate back Meal Help Metrics Connection settings for this mirror endpoint. Mirror error (%1$d) Configure send/receive and mirror server settings. Model Modes Nearby Permission New calibration (%1$s) New custom alert Newamount Newlabel Help Nightnum Help Enable Nightscout upload Nightscout upload Uploading in background Uploads paused Upload options Хэзээ ч үгүй Uploader paused Waiting for next upload Uploader running Retry scheduled in %1$d min Last response: HTTP %1$d Last response: HTTP %1$d Last response: invalid Nightscout URL Nightscout follower Nightscout follower idle Following Nightscout Refreshing Nightscout Nightscout follower paused Enter Nightscout URL No Nightscout readings yet Nightscout sync failed Last response: HTTP 404, endpoint mismatch detected Last response: HTTP 413, payload too large Сүүлийн оролдлого: %1$s Сүүлийн амжилт: %1$s Upload Insulin/Carbs (Treatments) Nightscout Settings Sync actions Nightscout URL https://my-nightscout.herokuapp.com Use Nightscout v3 API Create a read-only virtual sensor from this Nightscout URL. Enter a Nightscout URL first No active sensor selected No calibrations to export Not implemented natively Notification Permission Nutrients Offset Override silent mode Play alerts when phone is in silent mode. Sensor age Sensor expired Sensor life Sensor Help Sensormirror Setlibrenumtype Setting Help Settings changed — press to apply Shortcut Help Show trend arrow Slope Start: %1$s Stat Help Staticnum Stop Syncing... Talk Help Test alert Text alignment This action can be undone. Threshold (mg/dL) Typography Unable to open destination file Unable to open source file Undo Unknown error Unpair Delete the pairing bond on the sensor and clear saved keys. The sensor will be free to pair with another device. The sensor entry will remain in the app but will no longer connect. Unpair sensor Update URLs Vertical offset: %1$d dp Visuals Wait ~15 min (unstable) Watchinfo Wearosinfo Delete sensor data from this device. Wipe sensor data Manual calibarion
Generated %1$s · Page %2$d Patient information Not enough readings to render AGP profile. P10-P90 IQR Not enough daily data to render trend. No readings for this day. JugglucoNG CGM Clinical Report Range %1$s · Readings %2$d · Window %3$s to %4$s Estimated A1C Below target Above target Data density %1$s of 5-min cadence Time in range distribution Goal met Below goal TIR target (70%%): Below: %1$s Above: %1$s Ambulatory glucose profile (24h percentile bands) Reference targets: GMI < 7.0%%, CV <= 36%%, Time in range >= 70%%. JugglucoNG CGM Daily Trends and Interpretation Daily variability, metric breakdown, and interpretation notes Daily average trend Detailed metrics Std deviation PSG baseline Confidence %1$s Min / Max glucose Target low / high Very low / very high Clinical insights No generated insights No additional pattern warnings were generated for this time range. AGP consensus reference Targets referenced in this report follow AGP international consensus style: TIR 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L), TBR <70 and <54 mg/dL, TAR >180 and >250 mg/dL, with CV goal <=36%%. JugglucoNG Appendix I - AGP and Daily Tables Hourly percentiles and day-level outcomes Hourly AGP profile table Hour Samples IQR (P25-P75) No hourly AGP bins available in this range. Daily outcomes table Showing latest %1$d of %2$d days. JugglucoNG Appendix II - Events and Daily Profiles Hypo/hyper exposure metrics and day-level profile charts Hypo / hyper exposure events Hours/day Events/day Avg duration (h) Daily glucose profiles Hide source values Show only calibrated values when calibration is enabled. Calibrated only Source + calibrated Lock past history Use only calibration points at or before each reading time. When off, calibration starts near the first calibration point and extends forward. Write calibrated values Write in DB for statistics, reports, and export. Visual mode: continue calibrating from the value you currently see. Scan this QR Code on the Follower device Nearby Sibionics BLE (FF30) If your sensor appears here, Bluetooth is alive. QR scan is still preferred for full setup. No FF30 Sibionics devices found yet. Selected: %1$s Use fake QR info from this BLE name Wear transport Configure Wear OS data transport and sync state. Wear transport runtime is available. Wear transport runtime is unavailable for this app session. Google Play Services unavailable; Wear transport is disabled. Force a fresh watch discovery and network sync cycle. Nightscout-compatible web server Invalid interval value Waiting for connection Sensor ready in %1$d minutes. Custom Patterns No readings available in this time range. No AGP sample Not enough readings to draw AGP Not enough daily data Coverage %1$d/24 Selected Sensor temperature Current reading Selected reading %1$s · Δ %2$s °C vs avg Trend Variability Rising CV %1$s%% indicates wider swings. Hypoglycemia Exposure %1$s%% in the severe low range needs urgent reduction. Prolonged Hyperglycemia %1$s%% in the severe high range suggests missed correction windows. Overnight Drift Detected Median overnight glucose is elevated versus daytime. Check evening insulin or carbohydrate timing. Frequent Unstable Days %1$d days in this window had less than 50%% time in range. Restore vendor session on add If a QR code or saved Glutec credentials are available, Juggluco tries to restore MQ session state during setup. Restore vendor session Restore vendor session Restore vendor session state from Glutec. Enter the sensor QR here if needed; account, sync, and API settings live in MQ / Glutec Account. Restore vendor session API URL Defaults to the HTTPS Glutec API. Change this only for a custom server or plain HTTP. MQ / Glutec Account Shared across MQ sensors. Used for vendor restore, optional Glutec sync, and SMS account actions. Manage the shared MQ / Glutec account, API URL, and optional sync used by MQ sensors. Sign in Clear account Signed in Credentials saved Not signed in Glutec cloud sync Optional. Upload MQ session start, continue, end, manual calibrations, and live reports to Glutec using the shared account. Sync on Sync off SMS sign-in and recovery SMS code Used for SMS sign-in, account creation, and password reset. Send login code Send signup code Send reset code Sign in with code Create account Reset password Check session Sign out Session valid Session invalid Manual calibration Local to Juggluco. Enter a finger-stick glucose value in %1$s. Requires a recent live MQ packet. Glutec follower Follow another Glutec account through the vendor cloud. Turning this on creates a read-only follower sensor in Juggluco. Follower account Enter the Glutec phone number or account to follow. Follower on Follower off Sign in to MQ / Glutec first. Enter a follower account first. Follower account not found. Follower request failed. Follow request sent. The follower sensor will wait for approval. Follower sensor enabled. Follower sensor disabled. Follower idle Refreshing follower Follower paused Following Enter follower account Sign in to MQ / Glutec first Need MQ login for follower Waiting for share approval No active Glutec session Waiting for Glutec session Follower sync failed No Glutec readings yet MQ login expired Incoming share requests Approve or reject follower requests for the currently signed-in Glutec account. No pending share requests. Approve Reject Share request approved. Share request rejected. Message: %1$s Account Session Cloud sync Followers Нарийвчилсан Glutec follower Follow another account · approve share requests Off Following %1$s Sign in by SMS code, create account, or reset password Show options Hide options Journal Show journal actions in chart and reading rows Predictive simulation Project glucose with trend, journal carbs, insulin curves, and activity Trend momentum Model profile Carb ratio %1$.0f g/U Insulin sensitivity %1$.0f mg/dL/U %1$.1f mmol/L/U Carb absorption %1$.0f g/h Forecast horizon %1$d min Dose calculator Suggest paired insulin or carbs from model profile and active insulin Meal curve Fast Mixed Slow Extended Pair insulin Pair carbs %1$s U suggested %1$s g covered Food %1$s Correction %1$s Journal setup Build insulin types, colors, and activity curves Import Health Connect activity %1$s · %2$d insulin types Quick log Visible events No journal events in this window yet Insulin BG Fingerstick Activity Note Note Onset Add insulin type Edit insulin type Active window: %1$s to %2$s Selected time Light Moderate Intense Insulin library Disabled insulin types Editable activity curve Curve preview Add curve point Point %1$d Minute Activity Reset curve Restore Disable Active insulin Counts toward IOB and predictions %1$d doses · %2$sU · %3$d%% now Running until %1$s Intermediate / NPH Ultra long basal Notification settings Customize notification shade Lock screen (AOD) AOD settings Customize always-on display Enable overlay service Accessibility service enabled Open Accessibility settings Show chart Show chart (expanded) Chart when notification is expanded Show chart (collapsed) Compact chart in collapsed view Show target range Highlight target glucose range on chart Font size: %1$d%% Status bar icon size: %1$d%% Arrow size: %1$d%% Opacity: %1$d%% Text size: %1$d%% Chart size: %1$d%% Use subtle outline Thin edge highlight around overlay Top Center Bottom Left Center Right CGM readiness Critical CGM setting Check Bluetooth, alarms, battery, notifications, and background behavior System ready Needs attention Bluetooth, alarms, notifications, and background settings look ready. %1$d settings need attention before CGM delivery is fully reliable. %1$d items may affect sensor delivery, alarms, or background updates. %1$d critical %1$d warning %1$d review Ready Critical Warning Recommended Manual Dismiss Review Fix Allow Turn on Bluetooth Open Location Open Notifications Open Alarm access Open Battery settings Open DND access Open Overlay access Open Data Saver Open NFC settings Android settings screen is not available on this device. Bluetooth radio Bluetooth is on for CGM streaming. Turn on Bluetooth so Libre, Dexcom, Sibionics, AiDex, iCan, MQ, and other BLE sensors can connect. Nearby devices permission Nearby devices access is allowed for BLE scanning and connections. Allow Nearby devices so Android can scan for and connect to Bluetooth CGM transmitters. Location permission for BLE Location permission is allowed for legacy BLE scanning. Android 6-11 requires Location permission before apps can scan for BLE sensors. Location services Location services are on for legacy BLE scanning. On Android 6-11, BLE scanning can fail when system Location is off. Notification permission Notification permission is allowed. Allow notifications so glucose values, signal loss, and alarm alerts can reach you. App notifications App notifications are enabled. Enable app notifications so ongoing glucose status and alarms are visible. Exact alarms Exact alarm scheduling is allowed. Allow exact alarms for reliable reminders, reconnect checks, and time-critical alerts. Battery unrestricted Android battery optimization is disabled for this app. Disable battery optimization so background BLE, alarms, and network sync are not stopped. Do Not Disturb access DND access is allowed for alarm behavior. Allow DND access if you expect urgent glucose alarms to break through quiet modes. Floating glucose overlay Floating glucose is off, so overlay permission is not needed. Overlay permission is available for Floating glucose. Allow drawing over other apps before using Floating glucose. Background data Data Saver is not blocking background network use. Allow background data if you use Nightscout, mirror, watches, follower sync, or cloud services. NFC for Libre scans NFC is on for Libre scanning. Turn on NFC if you scan or start Libre sensors with the phone. Manufacturer background controls Review vendor battery, auto-start, sleep, and background activity controls. Android cannot report every vendor-specific block. Invalid QR data Hostname too long Database busy, try again ICE label should be at least 16 characters Invalid QR code Scan Juggluco Mirror QR Connect to this device? A Juggluco Mirror QR code was scanned. This will sync glucose data with the remote device. Connect Connect to %1$s? Found at %1$s:%2$d.\nThis will receive glucose data from %3$s. Connection data missing Reconnect all Quick Pair Share My QR Same network - let another device scan Share Relay QR Across networks - uses TURN/ICE relay Scan another device QR to connect Local Network Broadcast on Network Let nearby devices discover this device Relay TURN relay for remote connections Connections No connections. Use Quick Pair or tap + to add. Холболтыг устгах уу? %1$s will be removed permanently. Connection Type Local Direct IP Same Wi-Fi. IP auto-detected. Across networks via STUN/TURN. Specific IP/hostname. Details Auto-detect IP Use local network discovery for this connection IP Address Manual local IP for this device Email or identifier - must match on both devices Hostname / IP Address e.g. 192.168.1.100 or myserver.com Default: 8795 Connection Label (optional) Human-readable name for this connection Direction Passive Идэвхтэй Хоёулаа Only listen for incoming connections. Only connect outbound to the other device. Both listen and connect outbound. Role Receive Data This device receives glucose data Send Data This device sends glucose data Security Must match on both devices Notification Alarm Хоёулаа High Medium Ascending Vibrate only Silent Restart App Force restart the application Haptics Sound duration Soft Steady Strong Escalating API destinations Preset-based chatbot and webhook delivery API destinations Send live readings to enabled destinations Destinations Add destination No destinations added %1$s will be removed. Destination name Custom webhook Telegram bot VK direct message VK text message Destination type Webhook JSON VK bot Холболт Delivery POST URL VK token Telegram bot token Chat or peer ID Recipient IDs VK API version Headers Authorization: Bearer token Message template Tap a token below to insert it. Minimum interval (minutes) 0 sends every accepted live reading. Trigger Өөрчлөх Every accepted reading Use only duplicate and interval limits. At or below low threshold Send when glucose is at or below the low value. At or above high threshold Send when glucose is at or above the high value. Outside low/high range Send when glucose crosses either threshold. Low threshold (%1$s) High threshold (%1$s) Every accepted reading At or below %1$s %2$s At or above %1$s %2$s At or below %1$s or at or above %2$s %3$s Туршилтын мессеж илгээх Туршилтын мессеж дараалалд орлоо Одоогийн уншилт байхгүй Эхлээд очих газрын тохиргоог бүрэн хийнэ үү Хэзээ ч үгүй Сүүлийн амжилт: %1$s Сүүлийн оролдлого: %1$s Хариу: %1$d Алдаа: %1$s API эх үүсвэр Бэлэн тохиргоо эсвэл өөрийн API-аас глюкозын мэдээлэл хүлээн авах API эх үүсвэр Тогтмол шалгадаг API-аас глюкозын мэдээллийг зөвхөн унших мэдрэгч байдлаар импортлох Эхлээд эх үүсвэрийн тохиргоог бүрэн хийнэ үү Эх үүсвэрийн URL Формат Глюкоз JSON VK compact text Шалгах давтамж (секунд) Хамгийн багадаа 30 секунд. API эх үүсвэр идэвхгүй байна API эх үүсвэрийг дагаж байна API эх үүсвэрийг шинэчилж байна API эх үүсвэр түр зогссон Эх үүсвэрийн URL оруулна уу API уншилт хараахан алга API эх үүсвэрийн синк амжилтгүй Очих газрын бэлэн тохиргоо сонгох POST normalized glucose JSON to any endpoint. Send text with the Telegram Bot API. The URL can point to a relay. Send compact GV text through VK community messages. Send readable glucose text through VK community messages. Өөрчлөх Use a numeric chat ID or @channel username. A person must start the bot first. Use numeric VK user or peer IDs. Each recipient must message the community first. Supports {token}; use a relay URL if api.telegram.org is unreachable. Эх үүсвэрийн бэлэн тохиргоо Эх үүсвэрийн бэлэн тохиргоо сонгох Өөрийн JSON endpoint Poll a URL that returns the normalized glucose JSON schema. VK direct message history Poll VK messages and import compact GV readings. VK token Илгээгч эсвэл peer ID Uses compact VK messages. Messages older than 24 hours can disappear.
